ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 INF (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 CQC (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 SF (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 THM (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 RF (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 SNP (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: MCPR-300 EXT (Barrett MRAD)
ThingDef.description: A precision rifle built around a modular system that allows quick caliber changes and configuration adjustments. Its design focuses on adaptability and repeatable accuracy, supporting long-range engagements across varying conditions and mission requirements. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost of range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 INF (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 CQC (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 SF (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 THM (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 RF (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 SNP (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Siginal 50 EXT (GM6 Lynx)
ThingDef.description: A semi-automatic anti-materiel rifle built with a distinctive recoil system that moves the barrel during firing to absorb force. This design reduces felt recoil while maintaining the power needed to engage distant targets and hardened equipment. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost or range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 INF (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 CQC (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 SF (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 THM (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 RF (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 SNP (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: LA-B 330 EXT (MK13 MOD 0)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action precision rifle configured for long-range accuracy with a focus on consistency and shot placement. Its setup supports stable firing and dependable performance, making it suited for deliberate engagement at extended distances. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost or range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 INF (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 CQC (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 SF (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficent.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 THM (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 RF (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 SNP (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: SP-X 80 EXT (M2010)
ThingDef.description: A long-range rifle tuned for reach and impact, pushing past standard engagement distances with a heavier cartridge. It favors deliberate, hard-hitting shots, trading speed for authority with every trigger pull. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost of range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR INF (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR CQC (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR SF (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR THM (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR RF (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR SNP (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Victus XMR EXT (AW50)
ThingDef.description: A heavy anti-materiel rifle designed to deliver extreme impact at long range. Its large-caliber rounds are intended to defeat hardened targets and equipment, with significant recoil that reflects its raw power and single-shot emphasis.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium INF (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium CQC (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium SF (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficent.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium THM (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium RF (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. RF stands for Range Finder. This variants add a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium SNP (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: FJX Imperium EXT (M200 Intervention)
ThingDef.description: A bolt-action rifle built for long-range precision with a focus on clean, decisive shots. Its high-velocity cartridge and stable platform reward careful aim, delivering strong performance at extended distances with a deliberate firing rhythm. Or you can just quick scope things. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost or range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 INF (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 CQC (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 SF(WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficent.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 THM (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 RF (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 SNP (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 EXT (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. EXT stands for Extended Mag. Unlike an IAR, you don't have to build a system around the gun for more shots. The gun is already equipped for more. This variant adds more bullets fired at the cost of range and accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Carrack 300 Polymer (WA2000)
ThingDef.description: A compact bullpup sniper rifle built for precision shooting in a reduced overall length package. Its design concentrates weight toward the rear for stability, supporting controlled, deliberate shots at long range without sacrificing maneuverability. Special Variant. Wood? Too heavy. Replace Wood with Polymer to make your rifle lighter and more maneuverable. Good buisness. This variants removes the Wood cost for Chemfuel.
